https://openminds.om-i.org/props/contrib._instruction: Add all relevant contributions (e.g., ownership, maintenance) for this device.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/contrib.label: Contribution
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/contrib.name: contribution

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/descrip._instruction: Enter a short description of the device. Describe the device itself for a custom-built device or note device-specific peculiarities or deviations from the standard product for a manufacturer-defined device.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/descrip.description: Longer statement or account giving the characteristics of someone or something.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/descrip.label: Description
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/descrip.name: description

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/externa._instruction: Enter the external diameter of the pipette.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/externa.label: External diameter
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/externa.name: externalDiameter

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/interna._instruction: Enter the internal diameter of the pipette.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/interna.label: Internal diameter
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/interna.name: internalDiameter

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/interna._instruction: Enter the identifier (or label) of this pipette that is used within the corresponding data files to identify this pipette.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/interna.description: Term or code that identifies someone or something within a particular product.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/interna.label: Internal identifier
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/interna.name: internalIdentifier

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/materia._instruction: Add the material that the pipette is made of.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/materia.label: Material
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/materia.name: material

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/name._instruction: Enter a descriptive name for this device, preferably defined by the owner.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/name.description: Word or phrase that constitutes the distinctive designation of a being or thing.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/name.label: Name
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/name.name: name

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/serialN._instruction: Enter the serial number of this device.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/serialN.label: Serial number
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/serialN.name: serialNumber

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/type._instruction: Add the device classification reference. Identify a device type for a custom-built device, or a hardware product for a device corresponding to a manufacturer-defined product model.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/type.description: Distinct class to which a group of entities or concepts with similar characteristics or attributes belong to.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/type.label: Type
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/type.name: type
